revision.comment: link to category on Commons is now defined on wikidata
1 revision imported: importing wikipedia
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:making categorization show up on newly imported categories and templates]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:1 revision imported]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:1 revision imported]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 2 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
revision.text:
==Old Content== ==Old Content== ==Old Content== {{Navseasoncats}} {{Commons category}} {{draft categories|
[[Category:9th century| Country]] [[Category:Centuries by country|09]] }} [[sn:9th century by country]]
[[en:Category:9th century by country]] [[en:Category:9th century by country]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove obsolete category Uncategorized categories
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q6522870)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵↵}}" to ""
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{Navseasoncats}} {{Commons category}} {{wikidata link|Q6522870}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:9th century by country]] <!--categories--> [[Category:sn_crud|TEST9th century by country]] [[Category:9th century| Country]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Centuries by country|09]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] (crud category cleanup) [[git:Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/22542364787|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Navseasoncats}}
{{Commons category}}
{{wikidata link|Q6522870}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:9th century by country]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:sn_crud|TEST9th century by country]]
[[Category:9th century| Country]]
[[Category:Centuries by country|09]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=9th_century_by_country here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=9th_century_by_country for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <!--templates--> {{Navseasoncats}} {{Commons category}} {{wikidata link|Q6522870}} <!--interwikis--> [[en:Category:9th century by country]] <!--categories--> [[Category:sn_crud|TEST9th century by country]] [[Category:9th century| Country]] [[Category:Centuries by country|09]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 1 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25261549402|commit triggered pipeline]]
